description:
Your eyes, leveled up. 
 Meet your new go-to eyeshadow stick for bold color and easy glam. Shadow Stix deliver creamy, high-impact pigment in a single swipe and set to a long-wearing finish that won’t budge. Use it as an all-over lid color, as a base to boost powder shadow, or smudge it along the lash line for a quick smoky moment. Built-in sharpener = always on point. 
 Net Weight 1.35g (0.048oz)
